title: Ambulance Lite
description: A simple mod that adds several treatments
body:
# General
_Ambulance Lite_ is a simplified version of the original mod. It contains only 4 types of medicines, which were originally intended in the original. They are easy to create, and because of this, Ambulance Lite is better suited for small modpacks, vanilla-style modpacks, or for mini-games with development in an empty world.

**Original mod** - [Ambulance](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambulance)![Ambulance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/514f8bc05e593c6fa1060d4e76b5984bad8fc571_0.webp)

## Medicine
![Medicine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2838e69e8ab654de85837211db3d344041ffabf.png)

When used, it applies regeneration for 20 seconds and relieves the effects of nausea and poisoning.

## Strong medicine
![Strong medicine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9deff385db5e60b6f1a9d1952ebfd145ff477d29.png)

When consumed, it applies a second-level regeneration for 20 seconds and relieves the effects of nausea, poisoning, mining fatigue and weakness.

## Bandage
![Bandage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14732a546aea12dde62e60170e4624d97ea7d0e2.png)

When used, it restores 2 hearts and relieves the slowing effect.

## First aid kit
![First aid kit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4a9c36e32577152cdbf4662e8217f212ea1513.png)

When used, it restores 2 hearts, imposes a second-level regeneration effect, and relieves the effects of wither, poisoning, nausea, slowness, and mining fatigue. Used 3 times.


# Modpacks
This mod can be used in any modpacks


# Discord
In my discord server you can ask more information about this and other my mods. It's Russian-speak, but you can speak English and I'll reply you.
